implementationGate.reason: P1G proceeded after owner clarification and repository evidence. Direct browser calls to wxapi.kaisaile.org were rejected by CORS during validation, so the target runtime defaults to an explicit same-origin /api/ksl production boundary while preserving HTTPS production override support.

transportDecision.override: VITE_KSL_CHESS_API_BASE may point at an HTTPS production host or approved same-origin /api/* prefix.
transportDecision.validationEvidence: Server-side curl to wxapi.kaisaile.org/liveproxy/GetActList returned real production rows; direct browser CORS failed; temporary same-origin /api/ksl validation proxy returned real browser rows without console errors.
